speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so you rush onto that. I need everybody to roll initiative, please, because we are now in combat.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Mm-mm. This is my first time on the show-show.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, she did that goblins thing with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I've done three one-shots, but no show-show.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) That's terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) I'm here now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we're rectifying it right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Goblins, The Screw Job, and then the Ass Sailor? What was it called?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The romantic cruise thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The Ass Sailor?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, The Ass Sailor was the name of the-- Oh! You were in the bar! The bar was, yes, The Ass Sailor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I keep looking over at you and thinking I'm on the Jerry Lewis telethon.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought we were all going to dress up tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is Caleb. There's Molly, just on the outskirts of the forest, this way. Bursting to each side of you, you see these large insectoid creatures that burst out of the dirt and ground. Beau, you are right over on this side, as you left your horse on a southern direction there. Both Nott and Keg are about 100 feet that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your horses are currently--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so they went after them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: While you guys are over by the house, you watch as this is going on, and there doesn't appear to be any action immediately near you, so you're quite a distance away.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I rush forward now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can. If your horse is still right by the-- No, your horses rushed off towards the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Her horse is still there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think my horse is still there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your horse is still there, that's right. You still have your horse there. You can jump on your horse and head that direction, if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to do that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: First, for the sake of order here, because we are engaging in a series of aggressive actions, let's all roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm felling the tree? Okay. Is this a strength check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (chanting) Keg, Keg, Keg!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That is an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The tree immediately falls forward off the side, snapping at where it was left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How did you have that? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, all of these tree pieces were sent by our friends at Steamforge as gifts. I was like, "I get to use these at some point," and you guys are using them tonight. Falling and snapping right at the front half of the cart, breaking through. I'm going to give Protto an attempt to try and dodge out of the way. He succeeds with a dexterity saving throw, because he's quite dexterous. He jumps back into the front of the cart, and you watch his lower half vanish as he stops there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Am I revealed, or am I hidden by the stump?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know. Actually, that's a valid point. I'm going to have you guys all roll stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With advantage, because we had time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: In advance, you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll say in advance.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Am I at disadvantage? I'm not moving, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, Vax die, yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All of you are pretty stealthy, except for you. As the tree falls onto the ground, all the horses suddenly rear up, and you've actually broken where the horses are attached to that cart. The axel snaps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was my trigger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, the carts back up at this point. There's a shout in the back and you hear Protto go like, "Boss, what is--" At which point, you're doing what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Slow, and I will target these four assholes right here, I think I can get in one go, probably. 40-foot cube.
